changes.summary: Optional set block (forces replacement when changed) to designate which contact-list columns hold WhatsApp contacts; at least one of phone_columns, email_columns, or whats_app_columns must be configured.
Required column name for a WhatsApp contact field within the whats_app_columns block.
Required WhatsApp column type (for example, work or personal) within the whats_app_columns block.
Description updated; this block is required when both email_columns and whats_app_columns are empty.
Description updated; this block is required when both phone_columns and whats_app_columns are empty.
Exported configurations include whats_app_columns blocks when WhatsApp columns exist on the contact list.
Flow YAML downloads now request the flow's published version when one is available, which can improve export success for published flows.
Export retries rate-limited API responses (HTTP 429) when listing flows and creating export jobs, and retries transient export-job failures that can occur under heavy API load.
The value set in configuration is now honored; provider max_clients is used only as a fallback when max_concurrent_threads is not explicitly set.
